## Meeting Purpose

[Explore Harmonic's capabilities for GrowthX's CRM and prospecting needs, particularly for early-stage companies.](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Harmonic excels at identifying early-stage (pre-seed/stealth) startups using AI-driven aggregation and filtering](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Platform limitations: no direct outreach capability, revenue data not scalable](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [GrowthX's current needs align more closely with Apollo's features for outbound and prospect identification](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Harmonic's strength lies in VC use cases; expanding sales functionality is on their roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Situation and Needs

  - [Inbound leads from various channels (LinkedIn, email, WhatsApp)](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [CEO (Marcel) managing high-value prospects across multiple platforms](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Recently onboarded HubSpot for general sales and pipeline management](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Seeking consolidated CRM solution with outreach capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Diverse client base ranging from public companies to stealth startups](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Core client needs revolve around marketing departments](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

### Harmonic's Platform Capabilities

  - [Database: 30 million companies, 193 million people](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [AI-powered aggregation from various sources (newsletters, TechCrunch, LinkedIn)](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Natural language search for specific company criteria (e.g., "startups founded in past year by prior VC-backed founder")](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Strong in identifying pre-seed and stealth companies](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Email generation through API waterfall method (20 combinations)](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Limited revenue data, collected on individual basis](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

### Harmonic's Limitations for GrowthX

  - [No native outreach capabilities from the platform](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Revenue data not scalable for comprehensive searches](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Cannot currently enrich existing lists with additional data columns (on roadmap)](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [Better suited for VC use cases than sales outreach at present](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

### Harmonic Company Update

  - [Current team size: 50 (grew from 25 in 18 months)](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Double-digit ARR with 100% year-over-year growth](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Focus on VC market (estimated $100M ARR potential)](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Plans to expand into other verticals after solidifying VC market position](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to consider Apollo for immediate outbound and prospecting needs](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Revisit Harmonic when GrowthX's ICP becomes more specific, particularly for Series A/B fundraising triggers](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Jack to keep George updated on Harmonic's development of sales functionality](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Potential reconnection as GrowthX scales and builds out their sales team](https://fathom.video/share/yL3eZN74uzsrc1yBCje2pV2scj2YWZr2?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
